sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40999" key="e)pistei/rion" type="gloss" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιστείριον·</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ τῆς νηός</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </entryFree>
